generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PMSMMotorComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first rotary joint."
]

instance PlanetaryGearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Planetary gearbox coupling the motor to the first axis platform."
]

instance CycloidalGearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox providing the required torque transmission for the arm."
]

instance MotorDriverComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor driver supplying current to the permanent magnet synchronous motor."
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring the input electrical current I_M of the permanent magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentStream
]

instance MotorEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High‑precision shaft encoder on the motor shaft measuring position θ_M."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleStream
]

instance GearboxEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High‑precision shaft encoder on the gearbox shaft measuring position θ_G."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxAngleStream
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction
instance MotorCurrentStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorAngleStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor
]

instance GearboxAngleStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoderSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance ReferenceTorqueData_M : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived reference torque r_M computed from motor current I_M."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinProcessingEnabler
]

instance ReferenceTorqueData_G : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived reference torque r_G computed from gearbox signals."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinProcessingEnabler
]

instance ReferenceTorqueData_Out : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived reference torque r_out for the joint derived from system dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinProcessingEnabler
]

instance MotorAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor angular velocity derived from motor position time series."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinProcessingEnabler
]

instance GearboxAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox angular velocity derived from gearbox position time series."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinProcessingEnabler
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData_M : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor torque r̂_M from Simulink under identified friction parameters."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinProcessingEnabler
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData_G : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox torque r̂_G from Simulink."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinProcessingEnabler
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData_Out : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated joint torque r̂_out from Simulink."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinProcessingEnabler
]

instance SimulatedVelocityData_M : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor angular velocity r̂_ω_M from Simulink."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinProcessingEnabler
]

instance SimulatedVelocityData_G : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox angular velocity r̂_ω_G from Simulink."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinProcessingEnabler
]

instance SimulatedVelocityData_Out : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated joint angular velocity r̂_ω_out from Simulink."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinProcessingEnabler
]

instance AxisSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML component/connector diagram model of the first axis comprising motor, planetary gearbox, cycloidal gearbox, and encoders."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinProcessingEnabler
]

instance MotorSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the permanent magnet synchronous motor including electrical dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinProcessingEnabler
]

instance GearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the planetary and cycloidal gearbox, including gear ratio and friction laws."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinProcessingEnabler
]

instance FrictionLawSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, and LuGre friction laws for motor and gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinProcessingEnabler
]

instance ProcessingSimulationExecutionComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component that executes the Simulink models and outputs simulated data traces."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinProcessingEnabler
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time friction identification using white‑box and black‑box models."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterEvolutionInsight, AdjustPIDControllerAction, UpdateFrictionTableAction, SelectFrictionModelBasisAction
]

instance ContinuousModelUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi‑physics model update to refine friction and mechanical models."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelUpdateInsight
]

instance DataTraceAggregationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Aggregates data traces from sensors and simulation outputs into a unified dataset."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataAggregationInsight
]

instance ModelVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides model‑based visualization of simulation results in a web dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance TraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Maintains traceability from data traces to models and asset components."
    DTDFVocab:provides TraceabilityInsight
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DigitalTwinProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Central processing component executing Simulink models and delivering DT services."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService, ContinuousModelUpdateService, DataTraceAggregationService, ModelVisualizationService, TraceabilityService
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionParameterEvolutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight showing the evolution of identified friction parameters over time."
]

instance AdjustPIDControllerAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to adjust controller PID parameters based on friction identification results."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance UpdateFrictionTableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to update friction tables used by the robot controller."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SelectFrictionModelBasisAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to select the most appropriate friction model basis from available options."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ModelUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating updates applied to the simulation models."
]

instance DataAggregationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight summarizing the aggregated data traces and their sources."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight displaying the model‑based visualization in the dashboard."
]

instance TraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight showing the traceability path from sensor streams to simulation data and model parameters."
]

// C14: Environment
instance MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PMSMMotorComponent, PlanetaryGearboxComponent, CycloidalGearboxComponent, MotorDriverComponent, MotorEncoderSensor, GearboxEncoderSensor, MotorCurrentSensor, MotorCurrentStream, MotorAngleStream, GearboxAngleStream
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is passive and does not generate control commands or outputs to the robot; it only visualises and identifies friction but does not influence the PT"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time synchronization with the robot’s sampling rate (milliseconds to seconds – real‑time)"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system consisting of the physical asset (first axis), data sources (encoders, current sensor), a processing component that runs simulation models, and a visualization dashboard; all tied together by the AAS and MQTT connectivity"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the operated phase, integrating design‑phase simulation models and operational live data for continuous model refinement"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "White‑box analytical friction models calibrated with live data; black‑box data models; validation performed by comparing simulated outputs against measured data traces; continuous identification mitigates parameter drift due to wear, load changes, temperature, with traceability through processing component"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT over IP network connecting the physical robot controller to the DT location; data streams include current and encoder signals; AAS defines connectivity"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of Asset Administration Shells (AAS) per IEC 62264/ISO 10303, SysML v1.7, and adherence to MBSE principles for engineering and simulation"
]
